[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00000000 a
1 00000000 a
2 00000000 a
3 00010001 2
4 00001000 1
5 10100001 3
6 00011011 4
7 10101101 5

01 10 00001001 2
12 21 10101001 4
23 32 00000000 a match 0 1 2
34 43 00000000 a match 0 1 2
45 54 00000001 1
56 65 00010000 1
67 76 00000000 a match 0 1 2
70 07 00000001 1

02 20 00001011 3
13 31 00000000 a match 0 1 2
24 42 00101011 4
35 53 01010000 2
46 64 00001010 2
57 75 11000101 4
60 06 00011010 3
71 17 10100101 4

03 30 00010000 1
14 41 00101001 3
25 52 10000001 2
36 63 00010000 1
47 74 00100001 2
50 05 00010001 2 match 3
61 16 00001000 1 match 4
72 27 10100001 3 match 5

04 40 00001011 3
15 51 10000101 3
26 62 00001010 2
37 73 01000000 1
